creator: hq@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please repocopy textproc/saxon-devel to textproc/saxon-he

saxon-devel contains an obsolete version of Saxon (8.9). Saxon-HE (version 9+)
is the current version. It is no longer the development version of Saxon but
rather the actual, production-ready version. Thus it should no longer be named
"devel".
